headline: Adobe Faces CMA Probe As Subscription Model And Valuation Come Into Focus
summary: The UK Competition and Markets Authority has opened an inquiry into Adobe’s early cancellation costs for its subscription products. The probe focuses on whether Adobe’s practices are unfair or deceptive for customers looking to end contracts early. This action comes while NasdaqGS:ADBE is already dealing with CEO succession questions and scrutiny of its AI and subscription approach. For investors watching NasdaqGS:ADBE, this redirects attention to the core of Adobe’s business model, which...
